title: v0.8.0
description:
## What's new in v0.8.0

### Autonomous mission
- Periodic **heartbeat** tasks for long-running goals (`autonomous_mission.yaml`, Mission tab, REST API).

### Project knowledge graphs
- Multiple indexed project roots, `workspace_graph_search`, HTML reports per workspace.

### Agent profile
- **Formality** (formal / informal / default).

### Reliability
- Stronger tools-first routing, cleaner summaries, improved `akasha doctor` for zip installs.

**Compare:** https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.7.0...v0.8.0

title: v0.7.0
description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.7.0 -->

## What's Changed
### Other
* [WIP] Add new orchestrator for LLM router category by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/65
* Fix debug telemetry leak, dead code, fenced-block tool injection, and path traversal in deliverables by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/66
* Improve agent pipeline: direct fast-path for conversational queries, sub-agent self-evaluation, and per-step deliverable retry by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/67
* fix(orchestrator): carry ORCH_DISK_DELIVERABLES_MARKER on deliverable-retry messages by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/68
* fix: don't advertise policy-blocked file tools in orchestrated deliverable prompts by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/69
* fix(orchestrator): require keyword signal alongside length for project-like classification by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/70
* fix(orchestrator): preserve tail of long briefs in retry decomposition prompt by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/71
* fix: don't satisfy PDF/PPTX deliverables with plain-text stubs by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/72
* fix: resolve `workspace:/` paths in `edit_file`, `search_replace`, `apply_patch`, and `file_diff` tool handlers by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/73
* fix(orchestrator): drop absolute synthesis length threshold by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/74
* fix: skip sloppy tool-prefix normalization inside multiline tool bodies by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/75
* fix(orchestrator): populate deliverables in deterministic fallback plan from message workspace paths by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/76
* fix: use parse_tool_calls() for sloppy-prefix detection in stream/response merge by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/77
* fix(orchestrator): preserve plan step metadata when code→conversation override fires by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/78
* fix: recognize markdown-style tool headers as multiline-body terminators by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/79
* fix: apply lineage-root plan UUID rewrite to partial-edit workspace tools by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/80
* Remove bare `agenda` keyword from direct-mode classifier by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/81
* fix: preserve absolute deliverable paths instead of stripping leading `/` by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/82
* New orchestrator by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/64
* Fix review feedback: security, correctness, and completeness issues across 0.7.0 by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/84
* Fix review feedback: memory leak, debug logging, TaskStore/await, env safety, workspace hardening by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/86
* Fix TaskStore held across `.await` in MainAgent::handle_message by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/87
* Global enhancement by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/85
* fix(policy): close path traversal bypass in can_read/can_write by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/89
* New orchestrator by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/88
* Fix agent routing: fast-path weather/news queries, strip thinking tokens, propagate target_agent by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/90
* Fix agent hallu by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/91
* Add AGENTS.md with Cursor Cloud development environment setup by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/92
* 0.7.0 by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/83


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.6.0...v0.7.0

title: v0.6.0
description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.6.0 -->

## What's Changed
### Other
* fix(gateway): pass MessageEnvelope by value to handle_envelope in all callers by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/50
* feat(gateway): Phase 1 AI OS - Gateway layer with MessageEnvelope and… by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/49
* fix(task-os): correct TaskResumed event emission and route matching by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/52
* feat(taskOS): Ai os/phase 2 task os by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/51
* fix(policy-engine): deny-by-default, restrict Running pause, nil UUID in gateway, state transition tests by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/54
* feat(policy-engine): Ai os/phase 3 policy engine by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/53
* feat: Ai os/phase 4 resilience by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/55
* feat(observability): Phase 5 AI OS - Timeline and metrics endpoints by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/56
* feat(cockpit): Phase 6 AI OS - GET /api/agents and GET /api/plugins by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/57
* feat(calendar): Phase 7 AI OS - Schedule exceptions API by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/58
* fix: address 7 PR review issues in gateway/task-lifecycle layer by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/60
* Fix XSS in MarkdownContent, stt whitespace validation, speech_transcribe description, timeline comment, lockfile version by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/61
* Fix review comments: resume_task race, audio format mismatch, exception endpoint security, docker fallback by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/62
* Fix: orchestrator TaskStore scoping, browser session timeout, timeline ordering, TTS voice ref leak by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/63
* 0.6.0 by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/59


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

title: v0.5.0
description:

## What's Changed

* V0.4.0 by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/42
* Security: fix Safari 13 regex lookbehind, data URL injection, and XSS via rehype-sanitize by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/45
* Fix security, correctness, and accessibility issues from review by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/46

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0

changes.text: Security: Safari 13 regex lookbehind, data URL injection, XSS (rehype-sanitize)
Path traversal, episodic filter pollution, pipeline no-op, correctness fixes
Async fs I/O, episodic min_importance, pipeline checkpoint recovery, env var substitution, personality test paths

title: v0.4.0
description:
## What's Changed
* fix: BitNetProvider is_available() borrow error and supports_streaming() misreport by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/41

title: v0.3.0
description:
## What's Changed
* Fix device bridge: TTL/cancel, device_id propagation, i18n, requestId param mismatch by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/38
* Fix device tools policy bypass, install.sh foreground flag, and add unit tests by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/39
* V0.3 by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/37


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.2.0...v0.3.0

title: v0.2.0
description: Calendar improvements, release and deploy workflow fixes, Tauri icons, and binary-only download links on the site. Prebuilt CLI, daemon, TUI and desktop app for Windows, Linux and macOS.

changes.text: Web calendar: fixed cell height, deduplication by parent, status colors, recurring task prompt edit, date alignment (month view)
Release workflow: one zip per artifact (no duplicate asset names), workflow_dispatch for manual run, deploy_site checkout
Update Release Notes workflow: multiline GITHUB_OUTPUT for description/title, workflow_dispatch with optional inputs
Tauri app icons: ICO and ICNS generated from icon.png for Windows and macOS
Site download page: direct links to binary archives only; note to not use Source code zip/tar.gz on GitHub

title: v0.1.0
description: Précompilés Akasha (CLI + daemon + TUI) + doc. Décompressez l'archive pour votre OS puis lancez akasha init puis akasha start.

title: Initial Release
description: First public release of Akasha — your privacy-first personal assistant.

changes.text: Core assistant engine with natural language processing
Local-first architecture — all data stays on your machine
Built-in skill library with 10 starter skills
